---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Wrangler Desktop
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14.0, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.13.0]
- PySide6 version: [e.g. 6.6.0]
- Wrangler version: [e.g. 3.22.0] (run `wrangler --version`)

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem here.
